titleStmt.title: SII 23.47: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 47. (A.R. No. 47 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This inscription does not refer itself to the reign of any king. We can assign it however to the twelfth century A.D. It mentions a maṭha called the Nāṟpatteṇṇāyiravar-tirumaḍam on the north bank of the tank, in the precincts of the temple of Tiruviśalūr-Mahādēva at Śōḻamārttāṇḍa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Maṇṇi-nāḍu a division of Virudarāja-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, built by Aravindaṉ Uttamāṇḍiyār and his son Nīṟaṇindāṉ Poṟkōyil Aṇukkanambi, and an endowment made by them in money for feeding the several temple servants therein, in addition to meeting the charges of the tirumandirappōnagam for the god. It refers to some inaccuracies in a stone record engraved previously in the Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-Uḍaiyār temple and sets forth to rectify them now. It gives a lengthy list of the several individuals who were the recipients of money, but it is not clear from whom and on what account it was.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . virutarājabhayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu coḻamāt tāṇṭa caruppeti
maṅkalamuṭaiya tiruvicalūruṭaiya mahātevar koyilil coḻakonār muppiyā
r Aravintan Uttamāṇṭiyār makan niṟaṇintān poṟkoyil Aṇukka nampiyum Ittevar
tirukkuḷattil vaṭakuḷaṅkaraiyil Ivarkaḷ Eṭuppitta nāṟpatteṇṇā yiravar tirumaṭattu
kku tevaraṭiyārai Amutuceyvikkaikkum Āḷuṭaiyārkku tirumantirap ponakattukkum
Ittevar śrī paṇṭārattu nāṅkaḷ Oṭukkukoṇṭu palicaikku kāṭṭiya kaiypiḻaipāṭum pe
rāṟṟā ṉiḻiccappaṭṭatu nāḷum Ipporuḷukku munpu tiricciṟṟam palamuṭaiyār koyililum munpi
l copānattilum veṭṭina kalveṭṭup piḻaiyātanmaiyilum puravacam kācukoṇṭa
paṭi Ikkoyilil kāṇiyuṭaiya civabrāhmaṇan pāratāyan tiruvicalūr ceḻumāṇikkam tan nāḷu
kkum tampi tiruvicalūr Eṇṇariyān nāḷukkum piccan tiruvicalūr nāḷukkum Āka ceḻumāṇikka
m koṇṭa kācu patināṟu Itil mantirapponakam celutta kāciraṇṭarai nikki maṭattukku pa
licaikku koṇṭa kācu patinmunṟarai Āritan kālukkum Ivan māman
civapaṭṭālakarkku ci mukkālukkum maṟaikkāṭan koṇṭa kācu mukkā
ṇi Itil mantirapponakattukku niṅkuṅ kācu Arai pāratāyan tiruvica lūr kaṅkaikoṇṭān tan
nāḷukkum tiruvicalūr Eṇṇariyāṉ nāḷukkum Uṭaiyavaṉ nāḷuk kum piccan tiruvicalūr nāḷukkum muṭiko
ṇṭān piccan nāḷukkum tirukkaḻippālai Uṭaiyār koyil kāṇi Uṭaiya jeyatarabrahmarāyar koṇ
ṭa kācu Iraṇṭaraiyum Āka nān koṇṭa kācu Irupattāṟekālum Uḷpaṭa Itil mantirapo
nakattāl niṅkuṅ kācu nālarai maṭattukku kācu Irupattonṟe muk kālum n caṅkaran civacoki munpi
l kalveṭṭuḷpaṭa nāḷopātikku koṇṭa kācu patiṉeṭṭu mantira ponakattukku niṅkuṅ kācu Iraṇṭum
maṭattukku niṅkuṅ kācu
kūttan piccanum
pāratāyan Arumoḻic cūri yan En nāḷukku koṇṭa kācu Eḻarai Itil mantirapo nakattukku
niṅkuṅ kācu Onṟarai nikki maṭattukku kācu Āṟu Ukaccan vikkavināyakan piccan maṭattukku koṇ
ṭa kāciraṇṭarai pāratāyan Arumoḻi Īcānapaṭṭanum Ivan makan Uyyak koṇṭānum kūtta
n piccaṉ nāḷukkum nān koṇṭa kācu pattu Itil mantirappona kattukku niṅkuṅ kācu Onṟemukkāl
nikki maṭattukku kācu Eṭṭekāl Ikkoyil kucakkāṇiyāḷarom caṇṭesuran cuntaranum Aṭi
kaḷ cuppiramaṇṇiyanum picca nuṭaiyanum piccan tiriṉampiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa kucavarom maṭattu
kku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Uvaccan Āṭavallān cirāḷan koṇṭa kācu Iraṇṭarai maṭattukku palicaikku
ciṅkamāṇi ponnan tirumeykāval paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu tillai vanamuṭaiyān Ānantavār
kaḻal tirumeykāval paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu pāratāyan kaṅkai koṇṭān ceyya pātatten En
nāḷukku koṇṭa kāciraṇṭum maṭattukku palicai Aḷakka kaliyarāman piccanāna munaippāṭi nāṭṭu veḷār ma
kannāna kāḷiyiṭaiyānpakkal koṇṭa nāḷaraikkum celvan piccan nāḷaraikkum
nampi Āḷkoṇṭa nāyakan nāḷ mukkālukkum Āka koṇṭa kācu Iraṇṭemukkāle Araikkāl
Itil mantiraponakattukku niṅkuṅ kācu Āka kāleyaraikkālum maṭat tukku palicaikku koṇṭa kā
cu Iraṇṭu Iraṇṭām vicai pāratāyan tiruvicalūr ceḻumāṇikkam maṭattukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟarai
Aṇṭanāyakar Aṭaippukku tāṅkoṇṭa kaācu Onṟu Ivar makan tevāṇṭān paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Oṉṟu
Ivan makan piccāṇṭār paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Ivan makan nampi paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu tiruneyttānappi
ccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu tirunaṭṭappiccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu tillai muvāyirap piccan paṅ
kukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Āḷkoṇṭanāyakap piccar Aṭaippu taāṅ koṇṭa kācu Onṟu
paṅku va nāṭṭu marutāntakan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Ivan tampi civakaliyāṇappic
can paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu varakuṇappiccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Ivan makan paṭampakkanāyakan paṅkukku
koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Iṣapavāhanap piccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu māṇikkan Āṭavalāṉ nāḷukku paḷḷikoṇ
ṭānpaṭṭan koṇṭa kācu Iraṇṭarai mantiraponakattukku niṅkuṅ kācu Arai maṭattukku palicaikku kācu Ira
ṇṭu pāratāyan mātavan Oḷipalaviḷakku mācilāmaṇi mahātevar koyil kāṇikku maṭattukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu
pāratāyan tiruvicalūr civapaṭṭālakan tan nāḷukku koṇṭa kācu Añcu Itil mantiraponakat
tukku kācu Onṟu maṭattukku kācu nālu Āritanampan Āṇṭanāyakan tan nāḷukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟe
mukkāle Oru māvarai muntirikai Itil mantiraponakattukku kācu kāl maṭattukku kācu Onṟaraiye Oru mā
varai muntirikai kācipan paḷḷikoṇṭān tiruvicalūr nāḷukku koṇṭa kācu munṟu mantiraponakattukku kācu A
rai maṭattukku kācu Iraṇṭarai Ikkoyil kāṇiyuṭaiyā ṉakkan paṟpanāpan periyān maṭattukku koṇ
ṭa kācu vaccan perumān Eṇṇā k koṇṭa kācu munṟu pūvac can viccātiran Uṭaiyā nam
koṇṭa kācu Iraṇṭarai ppi Iṭaiyan Aṭaippup paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Iraṇṭu Ivan ta
koyil piccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Ivan marumakan vānama (mana?)nāyakap piccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu
Ivan makan civalokanāyakap piccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Ivan makan piccāṇṭār paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu civanpo
n cuntarappiccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Ivan makan tillai nāyakap piccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Oṉṟu ceḻumāṇikkap
picca raṭaippu tam paṅkukku koṇṭa kāconṟu Ivan makan nāṟpat teṇṇāyirap piccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu
Ālālacuntarap piccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu veḷḷaivāraṇap piccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Arumaruntup pic
can paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Aṇṭanāyakap piccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu marutamāṇik
kap piccan paṅkukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟu Ikkoyilil kāṇiyuṭaiya nāḷ cekallum(?) tiruvirā
jentracoḻapaṭṭan maṭattukku palicaikku koṇṭa kācu Arai Ittiru maṭattukku Āṇṭā
ṉ Amutu ceykaikku Itil ṇṭārattu civabrāhmaṇarpakkal Oṭuk kina A
ni Irupatinālu Āḷuṭaiyār Amutu ceytu
Onṟinālum kkuṟikkāl m Āṟu ṭai nūṟṟeḻupatinpalam Ārita nampi
kkā n piccan Iraṇṭām vicai maṭattukku koṇṭa kācu Oṉṟu pāratāyan kaṅkaiko
�ṇṭa teva nāḷukku maṭattukku koṇṭa kācu Onṟemukkāle Araikkāṇi muntiri ṭhe Inscription stops here
Digital edition of SII 23.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
